demographics.living_situation: residential aged care facility; fully dependent for all daily activities and transfers; requires 1-to-1 assistance for all eating and drinking

contact_nok.relationship: aged care facility nursing staff (primary informant this call)

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: He turned completely blue while eating his pureed food and coughed violently for five minutes; he sounds terribly congested now. (Call made by the aged care nursing staff — the resident cannot speak clearly himself.)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: During dinner he had a sudden violent coughing fit, went blue in the face for a short time, and now he is breathing fast, distressed and sounds wet and congested — the staff want to know what to do tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: suddenly, this evening, a few minutes into his dinner
symptom_narrative.duration: the coughing fit lasted about five minutes; he has been congested and distressed since
symptom_narrative.character: a sudden violent coughing fit while eating pureed food, with a brief blue discolouration of the face; now a wet, congested-sounding cough and fast breathing
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the staff say it was frightening — he went blue and could not stop coughing; he is still visibly distressed and working hard to breathe
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: throat and chest — congested wet sounds when he breathes and coughs
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on abruptly during the meal; the acute coughing has settled but the congestion and fast breathing persist
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: the staff cleared his mouth and stopped feeding him, which helped the choking settle
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it happened while he was being fed his modified meal
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: looks anxious, breathing quickly, keeps clearing a wet-sounding cough
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: the staff say he has long-standing trouble swallowing and is on a special modified (pureed) diet with thickened fluids because of it
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: he is fully dependent and cannot feed himself; staff feed him one-to-one

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a major stroke about two years ago
past_medical_history.how_managed: left with permanent right-sided weakness and difficulty speaking; cared for in the facility

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing difficulty swallowing — on a pureed diet and thickened fluids
past_medical_history.how_managed: modified-texture diet and one-to-one assisted feeding

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: right-sided weakness and stiffness, and trouble speaking clearly, since the stroke

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives in a residential aged care facility, fully dependent on staff; unable to communicate clearly himself due to speech difficulty after the stroke; nursing staff report on his behalf

communication_style.typical_message_style: the resident cannot give a clear history (expressive speech difficulty and garbled speech); all information comes from the nursing staff informant

objective_data_offered.value: oxygen level 94% on the facility's finger oximeter
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single facility bedside reading during distress; not a clinician-verified measurement

objective_data_offered.value: breathing rate about 22 breaths per minute
sitting upright in a wheelchair, visibly anxious, breathing rapidly, frequently clearing a wet-sounding cough
dinner tray with pureed food and mildly thickened fluids; staff have cleared his mouth and stopped feeding
